seo.title: Retainer Billing & Client Retainer Invoicing | Invoicemonk
seo.description: Automate retainer invoicing for ongoing client relationships. Recurring billing, drawdown tracking, and professional retainer management. Free tier available.

hero.title: Effortless retainer invoicing
hero.description: Automate monthly retainer billing for your clients. Set fixed amounts, recurring schedules, and let Invoicemonk handle the rest.

overview.title: The power of retainer-based revenue
paragraphs: Retainer billing transforms the feast-or-famine cycle of project-based work into steady, predictable revenue. For agencies, consultants, and professional service firms, retainers represent the gold standard of client relationships — ongoing commitments that provide financial stability while ensuring clients receive consistent, high-quality service. The difference between a business that struggles with cash flow and one that grows confidently often comes down to how much of its revenue is recurring.

Managing retainers manually, however, introduces unnecessary friction. Creating the same invoice every month, remembering different amounts for different clients, tracking which retainers have been paid and which are overdue — these tasks consume valuable hours that should be spent on billable work. Worse, manual processes lead to errors: a missed invoice means a missed payment, and an incorrect amount damages client trust.

Invoicemonk automates the entire retainer billing workflow. Define each client's retainer amount, billing frequency, and payment terms once, and the system handles everything from invoice generation to delivery and follow-up reminders. You maintain full visibility over your recurring revenue while eliminating the administrative burden that comes with managing multiple retainer relationships.

benefits.title: Why retainer billing with Invoicemonk?
benefits.subtitle: Predictable revenue, happier clients, less admin work

items.title: Automated Billing Cycles
items.desc: Set a schedule — monthly, quarterly, or custom — and Invoicemonk generates and sends retainer invoices automatically. No more first-of-the-month invoice marathons.

items.title: Revenue Forecasting
items.desc: See your total recurring revenue at a glance. Invoicemonk's dashboard shows you exactly how much retainer income to expect each month, making financial planning straightforward.

items.title: Professional Branded Invoices
items.desc: Every retainer invoice carries your business branding, clear payment terms, and itemized descriptions. Clients receive a polished, professional document every billing cycle.

items.title: Client Retention Insights
items.desc: Track retainer history per client — see how long they've been on retainer, total billed, and payment patterns. Use this data to strengthen relationships and identify upsell opportunities.

items.title: Time & Expense Tracking
items.desc: Log hours and expenses against each retainer client. Compare actual work delivered to the retainer amount to ensure profitability and demonstrate value to clients.

items.title: Flexible Adjustments
items.desc: Increase or decrease retainer amounts mid-contract with changes applying from the next cycle. Handle rate reviews and scope changes without disrupting your billing workflow.

example.title: Retainer billing in action
example.scenario: Scenario: A law firm managing 20 retainer clients
paragraphs: Adekunle & Partners is a mid-size law firm with 20 clients on monthly retainer agreements ranging from ₦200,000 to ₦2,500,000. Previously, a junior associate spent three days each month preparing and sending retainer invoices — time that could have been billed to clients.

After switching to Invoicemonk's recurring billing, the firm set up all 20 retainer schedules in one afternoon. Each client's retainer has specific terms: some include VAT, others require withholding tax calculations, and three international clients are billed in USD. All of this is configured once and runs automatically.
The result: the firm recovered over ₦600,000 in billable hours per month, reduced payment delays by 35%, and now has real-time visibility into their recurring revenue pipeline.

items.question: What is retainer billing?
items.answer: Retainer billing is a recurring payment model where clients pay a fixed amount — monthly, quarterly, or on a custom schedule — for ongoing services or guaranteed access to your expertise.

items.question: How do I set up retainer invoices in Invoicemonk?
items.answer: Create a recurring invoice with the retainer amount, schedule, and payment terms. Invoicemonk auto-generates and sends the invoice each period.

items.question: Can I track hours against a retainer?
items.answer: Yes. Track hours and expenses per client through Invoicemonk's time and expense tracking features, then compare actual work against the retainer amount in your reports.

items.question: What happens if a retainer needs adjusting mid-contract?
items.answer: Update the recurring invoice amount at any time. Changes apply from the next billing cycle onwards. Previous invoices remain unchanged.

items.question: How do retainers differ from project-based billing?
items.answer: Retainers provide a fixed, predictable income regardless of the specific tasks completed. Project-based billing ties payment to specific deliverables.

items.question: Can I offer different retainer tiers to clients?
items.answer: Yes. Create unique recurring schedules for each client with different amounts, frequencies, and terms.

items.question: What if a client wants to pause their retainer?
items.answer: Pause the recurring schedule with one click. No invoices will be generated during the pause period.

items.question: Do retainer invoices include tax calculations?
items.answer: Yes. Every retainer invoice automatically includes the tax rates you configured — VAT, GST, sales tax, or withholding tax.
